mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in FEDFUNDS transmits through lower discount rates and easier financial conditions, supporting equity valuation and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average when FEDFUNDS is falling over a 3-month window, or if the signal shows no positive Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and demand, which leads equity prices lower over the next month as earnings expectations are cut.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes of rising unemployment do not produce negative 20-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the average post-trigger return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly retail sales growth in RSAFS indicates resilient final demand and supports near-term earnings revisions, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS is above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS-above-trend episodes fail to generate positive 5-day SPX returns more than 50% of the time, or if the short-horizon return spread is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO combined with improving PAYEMS indicates broad-based production and labor recovery, which eases recession fears and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous improvements in INDPRO and PAYEMS do not outperform either series alone in predicting positive 20-day SPX returns, or if the combined signal has no incremental Rank IC.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL rises while FEDFUNDS remains near the floor, real policy rates become more negative, boosting liquidity-sensitive equity valuations and delivering positive 60-day SPX returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.25% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation above 2.5%
failure_condition: Reject if low-rate/high-inflation trigger episodes do not have higher 60-day SPX returns than untriggered periods, or if returns are not positively related to the interaction term.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals a housing demand slowdown that typically precedes broader demand weakness and negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 12-month moving average by more than 8%
failure_condition: Reject if housing-below-trend episodes fail to precede negative 60-day SPX returns or if the average forward return is not materially lower than the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS print together with elevated UNRATE identifies a labor market deterioration that compresses profit expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal does not predict negative 20-day SPX returns better than either series alone, or if triggered returns are not below zero on average.

mechanism_narrative: In a recessionary regime, falling INDPRO paired with weak PAYEMS indicates production cuts and labor shedding, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for 2 consecutive months and PAYEMS is below its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if contraction episodes in recessionary regimes do not produce negative 5-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the interaction loses significance out of sample.
